SEARCH
Package dev.jeka.core.api.file

Class JkPathTree

java.lang.Object
dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkAbstractPathTree<JkPathTree>
dev.jeka.core.api.file.JkPathTree
public class JkPathTree extends JkAbstractPathTree<JkPathTree>
Provides a view on files and sub-folders contained in a given directory or zip file. A JkPathTree may have some include/exclude filters to include only or exclude specified files.
When speaking about files contained in a JkPathTree, we mean all files contained in its root directory or subdirectories, matching positively the filter defined on it.

Path matchers generally rely on glob patterns.
